description_long: This is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners, finished in a vibrant red color. The back features a single prominent camera lens in the top left corner, accompanied by a small flash, and a centered, dark Apple logo. The front is dominated by a large, edge-to-edge display with a colorful abstract wallpaper and a small notch at the top for sensors and the front-facing camera. The sides are slim and metallic, with visible button placements and a SIM card slot. The device appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, giving it a premium and durable feel. Its compact size and smooth surfaces make it suitable for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A red, modern smartphone with a large display, single rear camera, and a centered Apple logo. The device features a sleek glass and metal construction with a vibrant screen and minimal bezels.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the red back panel, single camera lens with flash in the top left, and a centered dark Apple logo.
description_view_1: Left edge view displaying the slim profile, SIM card slot, and subtle button outlines.
description_view_2: Front view highlighting the large, colorful display with a top notch and minimal bezels.
description_view_3: Right edge view showing the slim profile and visible button placements.
attribute_brand_logo: A dark Apple logo is centered on the back panel, contrasting against the red surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful abstract wallpaper with flowing red, pink, white, and black shapes. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens is located in the top left corner on the back, accompanied by a small flash next to it.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the left and right edges, likely including a volume rocker and power button. The SIM card slot is also present on the left edge.
